zh.lifeSummary: 當Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael於大約1103年出生在英國威爾斯波斯時，他的父親Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor63歲，母親Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales35歲。他於1153年與Gladys Verch Philip在威爾士拉德諾斯爾馬利德結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1179年9月22日享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael于大约1103年出生在英国威尔斯波斯时，他的父亲Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor63岁，母亲Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales35岁。他于1153年与Gladys Verch Philip在威尔士拉德諾斯爾馬利德结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1179年9月22日享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Prince
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the royal title, Old French prince (Latin princeps). The name is popular among Blacks in Britain and the United States, influenced perhaps by the fame of the American singer Prince ( b. 1958 as Prince Rogers Nelson ).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: and
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael was born about 1103, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor, was 63 and his mother, Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales, was 35. He married Gladys Verch Philip in 1153, in Maelienydd, Radnorshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 22 September 1179, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael est né environ 1103, à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor, avait 63 ans et sa mère, Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Gladys Verch Philip en 1153, à Maelienydd, Radnorshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 22 septembre 1179, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael um 1103 in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor 63 und seine Mutter Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales 35. Er hat 1153 in Maelienydd, Radnorshire, Wales Gladys Verch Philip geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 22. September 1179 im Alter von 77 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael è nato il circa 1103 nel Powys, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor, aveva 63 anni e il suo madre, Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Gladys Verch Philip nel 1153, nel Maelienydd, Radnorshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 22 settembre 1179, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfaelが約1103年にイギリスウェールズポウイスで生まれた時，父Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnorは63歳，母Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Walesは35歳であった。1153年にウェールズラドノーシュアイアメイリーニーッドでGladys Verch Philipと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1179年9月22日に77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael(이)가 대략 1103년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor(은)는 63세였고, 그의 어머니 Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1153년 웨일스 라드노르실르 메이리니드에서 Gladys Verch Philip(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1179년 9월 22일 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael nasceu aproximadamente 1103, em Powys, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor, tinha 63 anos e sua mãe, Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Gladys Verch Philip em 1153, em Maelienydd, Radnorshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de setembro de 1179, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael родился около 1103 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor было 63 года, а матери, которую звали Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Gladys Verch Philip в 1153 г. в местности мэелиенидд, радноршир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 22 сентября 1179 г. в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Prince Cadwallon of Maelienydd and Elfael nació aproximadamente 1103, en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor, tenía 63 años y su mamá, Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Gladys Verch Philip en 1153, en Maelienydd, Radnorshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de septiembre de 1179, a la edad de 77 años.
